grip: BLOCKED (exit 1)
planes: architecture · governed modules: 6 · ungoverned: 1

blocking violations (1):
  ✖ [arch.illegal-dependency] app/Infrastructure (app/Infrastructure/OrderRepository.php:6) — module app/Infrastructure depends on app/Domain at app/Infrastructure/OrderRepository.php:6, which is not in its allowed dependencies — add app/Domain to app/Infrastructure's dependencies.allow or remove the dependency.
